title: SatSmtNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-sat-smt-server (CNF SAT / lightweight SMT solving over HTTP and NATS). The server subscribes to solve requests under the dd-sat-smt-server queue group so requests load-balance across replicas, and publishes solve results plus runtime events. Payloads carry a sat.solve.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: CNF SAT / lightweight SMT solve request/result pipeline.

subjects.name: SatSolveRequests
subjects.description: Inbound CNF SAT / SMT solve requests consumed by the sat-smt server. Subscribed with the dd-sat-smt-server queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for SAT_SOLVE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.sat.solve.requests

subjects.name: SatSolveResults
subjects.description: Solve outcomes (sat/unsat/unknown with a model when satisfiable) emitted by the sat-smt server. Carries a sat.solve.v1 envelope. Default for SAT_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.sat.solve.results

queueGroups.name: SatSmtServerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-sat-smt-server replicas consuming solve requests.
